title: Activating the Reclassify Points tool from the toolbar
capture_instructions: Queens Campus point cloud visible in Classification color mode. The cursor is hovering over (or just clicked) the 'Reclassify Points' button in the top toolbar. The button should appear highlighted/active. The sub-panel below (or near) the toolbar should be visible with the Drag-Select and Polygon sub-mode buttons. The overlay instruction text is visible in the 3D viewport.
ui_state: Reclassify Points tool active, sub-panel visible, Drag-Select sub-mode default

annotations.label: Sub-panel: Drag-Select and Polygon mode toggle buttons
Overlay: 'Drag to select points · Alt+drag to deselect · Esc to exit'
